titles.ar: بَابٌ فِي أَنَّ التَّوَاخِيَ لَمْ يَقَعْ عَلَى الدِّينِ وَ إِنَّمَا هُوَ التَّعَارُفُ
titles.en: Chapter 74 – Regarding, that the brotherhood does not yet occur upon the Religion, and rather it is the recognition (of Al Wilayah)

titles.ar: بَابٌ فِي أَنَّ التَّوَاخِيَ لَمْ يَقَعْ عَلَى الدِّينِ وَ إِنَّمَا هُوَ التَّعَارُفُ
titles.en: Chapter 74 – Regarding, that the brotherhood does not yet occur upon the Religion, and rather it is the recognition (of Al Wilayah)

segments: لَمْ تَتَوَاخَوْا عَلَى هَذَا الْأَمْرِ وَ إِنَّمَا تَعَارَفْتُمْ عَلَيْهِ .
arabic.text: لَمْ تَتَوَاخَوْا عَلَى هَذَا الْأَمْرِ وَ إِنَّمَا تَعَارَفْتُمْ عَلَيْهِ .

segments: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Hamza Bin Muhammad Al Tayyar, from his father,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘You are not yet establishing brotherhood upon this matter (Al-Wilayah), but rather you are being recognised upon it’.
en.hubeali.text: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Hamza Bin Muhammad Al Tayyar, from his father, (It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘You are not yet establishing brotherhood upon this matter (Al-Wilayah), but rather you are being recognised upon it’.

segments: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Muhammad ibn Sinan from Hamza ibn Muhammad al-Tayyar from his father from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “You have not become brothers on the basis of this belief (of Shi’a Muslims) but you have recognized each other because of it.”’
en.sarwar.text: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Muhammad ibn Sinan from Hamza ibn Muhammad al-Tayyar from his father from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “You have not become brothers on the basis of this belief (of Shi’a Muslims) but you have recognized each other because of it.”’

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور معتبر عند ي - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/ 9)
gradings.label: ضعيف على المشهور معتبر عند ي
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور معتبر عند ي - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/ 9)

narratorChain.raw: مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ يَحْيَى عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ حَمْزَةَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الطَّيَّارِ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ

titles.ar: بَابٌ فِي أَنَّ التَّوَاخِيَ لَمْ يَقَعْ عَلَى الدِّينِ وَ إِنَّمَا هُوَ التَّعَارُفُ
titles.en: Chapter 74 – Regarding, that the brotherhood does not yet occur upon the Religion, and rather it is the recognition (of Al Wilayah)

segments: لَمْ تَتَوَاخَوْا عَلَى هَذَا الْأَمْرِ وَ إِنَّمَا تَعَارَفْتُمْ عَلَيْهِ .
arabic.text: لَمْ تَتَوَاخَوْا عَلَى هَذَا الْأَمْرِ وَ إِنَّمَا تَعَارَفْتُمْ عَلَيْهِ .

segments: From him, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Usman Bin Isa, from Ibn Muskan, and Sama’at, altogether,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘You are not yet establishing brotherhood upon this matter (Al-Wilayah), but rather you are being recognised upon it’.
en.hubeali.text: From him, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Usman Bin Isa, from Ibn Muskan, and Sama’at, altogether, (It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘You are not yet establishing brotherhood upon this matter (Al-Wilayah), but rather you are being recognised upon it’.

segments: 2. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa from ibn Muskan and Sama’a all from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “You have not become brothers on the basis of this matter (Walayah the belief of the Shi’a Muslims); it is only that you have recognized each other by means of Walayah .”
en.sarwar.text: 2. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ‘Uthman ibn ‘Isa from ibn Muskan and Sama’a all from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “You have not become brothers on the basis of this matter (Walayah the belief of the Shi’a Muslims); it is only that you have recognized each other by means of Walayah .”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (26/ 9)
gradings.label: موثق
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (26/ 9)

narratorChain.raw: عَنْهُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عُثْمَانَ بْنِ عِيسَى عَنِ ابْنِ مُسْكَانَ وَ سَمَاعَةَ جَمِيعاً عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
